name: Top 2026 App Categories by Revenue
purpose: Inform default category routing in onboarding-v2 master prompts. Sourced from RevenueCat State of Subscription Apps 2025/2026, Adapty 2026 paywall benchmarks, Sensor Tower 2024-2025 reports, data.ai (formerly App Annie) 2025 mobile app market reports, Adjust 2025 mobile app trends, AppMagic 2026 forecasts, and 2024-2025 indie/solo-dev case studies (Mau Baron Prayer Lock, Cal AI, Headway, Headspace).

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: RevenueCat 2025: AI-wrapper category fastest-growing subscription category by revenue, 2× growth YoY. data.ai 2025: ChatGPT mobile alone $250M+ ARR consumer subs by Q4 2024. Adapty 2026: AI-wrapper apps cluster at top of paywall conversion benchmarks despite lower trial conversion (5.31% vs 10.92% avg) — direct purchase rate +14% over avg.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +200% YoY revenue (RevenueCat 2025); fastest-growing category in App Store consumer subs
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Long Questionnaire (Cal-AI style) OR Story-Onboarding (Mau-Baron style) with AI Plan Reveal at peak
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.ltv_benchmark: $40-80 12mo cohort LTV with weekly+3-day-trial; AI-wrapper hybrid monetization (35% of apps run hybrid per RevenueCat 2025)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Sensor Tower 2024: wellness apps $5B+ consumer subs 2024 (Calm $250M ARR, Headspace ~$200M ARR, Flo ~$50M ARR). RevenueCat 2025: Health & Fitness category 2nd-largest by total revenue, highest D30 retention.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +15-20% YoY; AI personalization (Headspace AI Stories, Calm AI sleep stories) driving 2024-2025 growth
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Story-Onboarding (Mau-Baron) dominant; Long-Questionnaire (Cal-AI) for metrics-heavy variants (Flo, Cal AI, Noom)
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.archetype_lean: Caregiver (Calm, Headspace), Magician (transformation arc — Cal AI, Headway), Sage (Headspace Therapy)
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.ltv_benchmark: $32-60 12mo cohort LTV; long-onboarding doctrine particularly strong

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: data.ai 2025: photo/video apps $4B+ consumer subs (CapCut, VSCO, Lightroom Mobile, Mojo). Sensor Tower 2025: TikTok/Meta-driven UGC creator economy boosting subscription tier upsell.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +10-15% YoY; AI features (CapCut AI, Lightroom Generative Remove) reducing churn
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Cinematic 4-Screen (utility-leaning) OR Long Questionnaire (for AI-feature-rich variants like Mojo)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Sensor Tower 2024-2025: dating apps $3.5B+ consumer subs. Tinder $1.6B, Bumble $1.1B, Hinge $400M+. AI matchmaking features driving 2024-2025 growth.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +5-8% YoY; Hinge fastest-growing among major dating apps via prompts-led identity onboarding
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Story-Onboarding (Hinge prompts arc) OR Long Questionnaire (Match metric-led)
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.ltv_benchmark: $60-120 12mo cohort LTV (high LTV per user despite churn pressure)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: data.ai 2025: edtech $3B+ consumer subs (Duolingo $750M ARR; Babbel ~$300M; Headway $100M+; Blinkist $80M+). Duolingo's 113M MAU (Q3 2024) anchors category.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +15% YoY; AI tutoring (Duolingo Max, Babbel AI) driving premium tier conversion
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Story-Onboarding for outcome-led (Headway, Blinkist, Babbel); Cinematic 4-Screen for fast-onboarding (Duolingo)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Sensor Tower 2024: Netflix mobile ~$1B subs revenue from in-app, Disney+ ~$500M, Spotify ~$8B (mostly web but mobile-aided onboarding). Note: most streaming revenue is web-first, mobile-onboarding-aided.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.archetype_lean: Various per brand (Netflix Magician, Disney Innocent, Spotify Lover)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: data.ai 2025: fintech consumer apps $2B+ subs (Acorns $250M ARR, Robinhood ~$500M revenue mostly trading not subs, Mint deprecated). Adapty 2026: fintech onboarding paywall placement converts lower than wellness — KYC dominates.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +8-10% YoY; AI-driven personal finance (Cleo, Copilot) emerging sub-category
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Single-Action Fintech (Acorns: link bank account); KYC-first dominates
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.archetype_lean: Sage (Robinhood, M1), Caregiver (Acorns, Cleo), Hero (Cash App)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: RevenueCat 2025: productivity is 4th-largest by revenue, smaller per-user but higher LTV for B2B (Notion mobile companion ~$50M+ subscription contribution; Linear, Cron, Sunsama smaller but high-LTV).
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +10% YoY; B2B-led growth, mobile is companion not primary
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Frictionless (Notion, Linear); minimal-onboarding doctrine (Karri Saarinen / Linear influence)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: data.ai 2025: fitness apps $1.5B+ consumer subs (Strava $200M ARR, Whoop premium ~$150M, Centr, Apple Fitness+). Sensor Tower 2024: highest D30 churn but stable recurring revenue.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +8% YoY; AI personalization (Whoop, Apple Fitness+ AI coach) driving premium tier
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.onboarding_pattern_dominant: Long Questionnaire (Whoop body-metrics first) OR Story-Onboarding (Strava community-led)
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.archetype_lean: Hero (Whoop, Centr), Magician (Apple Fitness+ transformation), Lover (Strava community)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Adapty 2026 case studies: faith-led apps Hallow $40M+ ARR, Pray.com ~$30M ARR, Prayer Lock (Mau Baron) $40K→$150K/mo trajectory. Underserved category with low competition + high LTV.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +25-30% YoY; SOLO-DEV-FRIENDLY category (Mau Baron solo founder example)

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Sensor Tower 2024: journaling/mental-health apps $800M+ consumer subs (Reflectly, Day One, Stoic, Dot, Finch). Sub-category of wellness, growing fastest.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: +20% YoY; AI-prompted journaling (Reflectly AI, Stoic AI) driving 2024 growth

top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.revenue_data: Mostly free with creator-economy subs; Patreon mobile, Substack mobile, Discord Nitro, BeReal. Subscription revenue growing but ad-led monetization dominates.
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.growth_2024_to_2026: Mixed; subscription tier growing within mostly-free apps
top_revenue_categories_2025_2026.archetype_lean: Lover (Locket), Jester (BeReal, Discord), Outlaw (Substack indie creators)

highest_ltv_categories: Productivity / B2B SaaS Mobile Companion ($80-180 12mo LTV)
Entertainment / Streaming ($120-180 LTV but high churn)
solo_dev_friendly_categories: Spiritual / Faith / Meditation (Mau Baron Prayer Lock proof — solo founder $40K→$150K/mo; underserved niche; community-led distribution)
Journaling / Mental Health (small surface, identity-led, story-onboarding)
Niche Wellness sub-categories (e.g., perimenopause, sleep-anxiety, chronic pain — underserved)
AI-Wrapper for niche workflows (writing, coding, design, language — defensible via niche moat)
Time-of-Day or Identity-Specific journaling (e.g., evening reflection, morning planning)
saturation_warning_categories: General-Purpose AI Chat (ChatGPT mobile saturates the consumer general-AI space; underserved niches still open)
General Habit Tracking (saturated with Streaks, Habitify, Tally; differentiation via category-specific niche only)
General Calorie Tracking (Cal AI, Lose It!, MyFitnessPal saturate; differentiation via specific dietary niche only — keto, halal, autoimmune)
Generic Meditation (Calm + Headspace duopoly; specific niches still open — sleep, faith-aligned, post-trauma)
Dating (incumbents dominant — only category-specific dating apps differentiate now)
